name: nimbus-console
description: Nimbus — a private cloud management console (AWS-style). Initial service: Load Balancers (NLB + ALB features unified).

scripts.dev: npm --workspace server run dev & npm --workspace web run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck
